name: US Politics
description: US politics: content about US political parties, politicians, elections, policy debates, or partisan commentary on US government and current affairs. Does not include politics of other countries unless directly compared to US politics.

name: Death
description: Content primarily about death, mourning, or mortality.

name: Sports
description: Content about organized sports, athletes, teams, games, and sports commentary.

name: Music
description: Content about musicians, songs, albums, concerts, or music culture and commentary.

name: Donald Trump
description: Content specifically about Donald Trump -- his statements, actions, or commentary directly about him.

name: Gaming
description: Content about video games, game culture, esports, or game-related commentary.

name: Mental Health
description: Content about mental health, emotional wellbeing, therapy, or psychological experiences.

name: Technology
description: Content about software, hardware, computing, or the technology industry.
